text: [Persuasion 2] "You've run convoys for ten years. You know the difference between bad luck and inside information. You've already decided which this is."
[Persuasion 3] "You pulled me in here because you've already made up your mind. Say it."
[Persuasion] "One minute. Before the next person walks out of this room."
[Observation] The Guild rep keeps checking her chrono. The Alliance rep hasn't looked at her once. One of them knows the clock runs out today.
[Persuasion] "Forty years in the tunnels. You sealed your mouth when the Union asked. Convoy crews are dying now and nobody's asked them to stay quiet. Flip the question."
[Persuasion] "Your pension buys what. Forty years in, you know what a Union promise is worth when the Union's falling apart. Talk."
[Persuasion] "Everything. Whatever's on those files has been eating you. Stop carrying it. Let me."
[Persuasion] "You've been carrying this alone for weeks. Hand it off. Let me be the one they come for when it leaks."
[Observation 2] His second tap was for him, not the scale.
[Observation] "His second tap was for him, not the scale. Your friend skimmed you. You saw the same thing I did. You just didn't want to."
